spaces.name: Consultorio
spaces.notes: Standard consultation rooms per COFEPRIS NOM minimum dimensions

spaces.name: Área de Urgencias
spaces.notes: Emergency area with ambulance access; includes triage and treatment bays

spaces.name: Laboratorio Clínico
spaces.notes: Clinical laboratory; medical gas and specialized ventilation required

spaces.name: Farmacia
spaces.notes: Pharmacy with controlled substance storage; COFEPRIS regulated

spaces.name: Recepción y Sala de Espera
spaces.notes: Combined reception and waiting; accessible route compliance required

spaces.name: Rayos X
spaces.notes: Diagnostic imaging room — radiation shielding required; flagged as specialist exclusion per template unless confirmed in scope

spaces.name: Enfermería
spaces.notes: Nursing station with medical gas, medication storage, hand-washing stations

spaces.name: Sanitarios
spaces.notes: Includes accessible restrooms per COFEPRIS; separate staff and patient facilities

spaces.name: Estacionamiento
spaces.notes: Surface parking including accessible spaces per NOM requirements

spaces.name: Circulación y Corredores
spaces.notes: Clean/dirty corridor separation per COFEPRIS infection control zoning; includes vertical circulation

assumptions: Total sqm calculation: 10 consultorios × 20 sqm = 200; urgencias 120; laboratorio 80; farmacia 60; recepción/sala espera 150; rayos-X 40; enfermería 60; administración 80; 4 sanitarios × 15 sqm = 60; estacionamiento 400; circulación 250 — sum = 1,500 sqm programmed area, with 90 sqm estimated for mechanical/utility rooms and medical gas system rooms (not itemized in seed data) bringing total to 1,590 sqm
Rayos-X room included in program per seed data — radiation shielding design flagged as specialist add-on service per SOW template exclusions; rough-in coordination included in scope
Landscape, irrigation, and solar excluded by default per commercial_health_center template
Backup generator included in MEP scope as special feature per seed data
Medical gas systems (oxygen, medical air, vacuum) required for consultorios, urgencias, laboratorio, and enfermería per clinical program
Specialized HVAC with pressure differential zoning required per COFEPRIS NOM standards
